title: Usopp Hears the Worst
description: The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 20, 21, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Kaku, Sanji. The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Allow me to speak frankly, but

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Will it take a long time?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Is something wrong with the keel?

summary: The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.
